description: Both static tiers block: Tier 1 FAIL (required field missing) AND Tier 2 RED (production hazard). Either alone forces fail-fast; together they still force t3=SKIPPED and final FAIL. Covers the (FAIL, RED, SKIPPED) corner of the (FAIL, any, SKIPPED) row.
why: § 5 R2 and R3 both fail-fast; § 6 R7 (t1=FAIL OR t2=RED). t3 SKIPPED per the fail-fast boundary.
